title: centaurea paniculata subsp. polycephala
intro: Centaurea paniculata subsp. polycephala, also known as Knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Centaurea paniculata subsp. polycephala can be found in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
